_doc: LEG E posture preset vectors — SEALED per MEMO_LEGE v1.0 §6.2 (SEAL FIRST). These are STRAWMEN at the owner's R104.4 sketch; PROPOSED, ruled by [OWNER] at the movers report. Balanced is the canonical profile and is NEVER tuned (it alone gates/bakes/seals).
dial_family: LENS discount-rate d over the D5 dial (rl_model.py:414); production stream year-k weight = 1/(1+d)**k

balanced.note: canonical; d = LENS['bal'] (RL_DIAL14 default). Byte-exact board 06d8af60. NEVER tuned.

contender.note: STRAWMAN. owner sketch 0.14->0.18-0.20 (future discount UP => now/near-term weight UP). sealed at 0.18 (low end). ratified at movers report.

rebuilder.note: STRAWMAN. owner sketch 0.14->~0.10 (future discount DOWN => future weight UP). ratified at movers report.

pick2027_discounts_binding.law: applied ONCE, final step, per posture; the lens fut dial must not touch a pick asset a second time (composition law, memo §4)

horizons.note: k=0 reproduces the balanced board byte-exact (LENS-PROJECTION invariant)
